series_metadata.series_description: Postal Reports, registered mail, insured mail logs, metered records relating to postal transactions and stamp requisitions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
